sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52045" key="kairo/filos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καιρό-φῐλος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n52045.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lover</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">observer of times</tr_>, epith. of an astrologer, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:271:25" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">271.25</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
